sentences.arabic: تَتَطَلَّبُ الِاسْتِعْدَادَاتُ لِمُقَابَلَةِ الْعَمَلِ أَكْثَرَ مِنْ مُجَرَّدِ مُرَاجَعَةِ السِّيرَةِ الذَّاتِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Priprema za razgovor za posao zahtijeva više od samog pregleda biografije.
sentences.translationEn: Preparing for a job interview requires more than just reviewing a CV.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُرَشَّحِ الْبَحْثُ عَنْ رُؤْيَةِ الشَّرِكَةِ وَقِيَمِهَا الْأَسَاسِيَّةِ لِإِظْهَارِ اهْتِمَامٍ حَقِيقِيٍّ.
sentences.translation: Kandidat mora istražiti viziju kompanije i njene osnovne vrijednosti kako bi pokazao istinski interes.
sentences.translationEn: The candidate must research the company's vision and core values to demonstrate genuine interest.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الثِّقَةَ بِالنَّفْسِ أَثْنَاءَ الْحِوَارِ أَمْرٌ حَاسِمٌ، لِأَنَّهَا تَعْكِسُ قُدْرَةَ الْفَرْدِ عَلَى التَّعَامُلِ مَعَ الضُّغُوطِ.
sentences.translation: Samopouzdanje tokom razgovora je presudno, jer odražava sposobnost pojedinca da se nosi s pritiskom.
sentences.translationEn: Self-confidence during the conversation is crucial, as it reflects the individual's ability to handle pressure.

sentences.arabic: عَلَاوَةً عَلَى ذَلِكَ، فَإِنَّ طَرْحَ أَسْئِلَةٍ عَمِيقَةٍ يُبَيِّنُ أَنَّكَ مِهْنِيٌّ مُبَادِرٌ وَمُطَّلِعٌ.
sentences.translation: Osim toga, postavljanje dubokih pitanja pokazuje da ste proaktivan i informisan profesionalac.
sentences.translationEn: Furthermore, asking insightful questions shows that you are a proactive and well-informed professional.

sentences.arabic: فِي النِّهَايَةِ، يَبْقَى الْهَدَفُ هُوَ إِقْنَاعُ صَاحِبِ الْعَمَلِ بِأَنَّكَ الْأَنْسَبُ لِلِانْضِمَامِ إِلَى الْفَرِيقِ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju, cilj ostaje uvjeriti poslodavca da ste vi najprikladniji za pridruživanje timu.
sentences.translationEn: In the end, the goal remains to convince the employer that you are the best fit to join the team.
